gloss.description: A concise, 1-2 word English gloss or a Leipzig abbreviation for grammatical particles.

ipa.description: The International Phonetic Alphabet transcription, including stress marks and syllable breaks.

syllables.description: The word broken down into its constituent CV syllables for rule validation.

slot.description: The particle's position in the three-slot system. REQUIRED for particles; FORBIDDEN for every other part of speech.

pos.description: The possible parts of speech, drawn from the closed set.

concept.description: The full concept name from the unified concepts document or grammar role.

description.description: The detailed description of the concept's meaning and nuance.

sound_symbolism.description: The poetic description of how the word's sounds embody its meaning through phonetic symbolism.

grammatical_notes.description: Cross-linguistic context explaining the word's grammatical flexibility and syntactic patterns.

solarpunk-values.description: Rationale for how this concept embodies solarpunk values.

secular-buddhist-philosophy.description: Rationale for how this concept embodies secular Buddhist philosophy.

art-nouveau-aesthetics.description: Rationale for how this concept embodies Art Nouveau aesthetics.

peace-linguistics-practices.description: Rationale for how this concept embodies peace linguistics practices.

pre-industrial-wisdom.description: Rationale for how this concept embodies pre-industrial wisdom.

pillars.description: The philosophical pillars this concept primarily embodies, with rationales for each.

tags.description: Semantic domain tags with brief rationales explaining how this word relates to each domain.
